summary: Successfully tested ZET Mindshare frontend features: new color palette (#292f91, #4ca8ad), 3-column toolbox, collapsible panels, language switching (English/Turkish), and ZETA AI functionality
passed_tests: New blue color palette correctly applied (#292f91, #4ca8ad)
Toolbox shows 3-column grid layout with 22 tools
Collapsible toolbox panel toggle functionality working
Collapsible right panel (pages + ZETA) toggle functionality working
UI labels successfully switch between languages
ZETA AI chat interface responding to messages
Authentication system working with test session token
